description: AI Training & Courseware — adaptive training modules, recurrent training management, and FAA knowledge test preparation

hard_stops.label: Training Content Outdated
hard_stops.logic: Regulatory change has occurred that is not yet reflected in courseware content

hard_stops.label: Knowledge Test Bank Integrity Violation
hard_stops.logic: Test question bank integrity compromised — suspected leak or unauthorized distribution

soft_flags.label: Persistent Weak Area
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has failed the same knowledge topic area 3 or more times

soft_flags.label: Recurrent Training Module Due
soft_flags.logic: A required recurrent training module is due within the current training cycle

soft_flags.label: WINGS Credit Expiring
soft_flags.logic: Earned WINGS credits are approaching expiration

soft_flags.label: New Regulation Training Needed
soft_flags.logic: New or amended regulation requires updated training content
